block_01: Avengers: Endgame hit a box office homerun! Since its release date on the 26th of April, the movie officially reached the $2 billion dollar mark in ticket sales and the run is not over yet.  If you remember, the movie Avatar held the record of the shortest run to 2 billion which was 47 days.
block_02: How does this relate to Disney?  Marvel Studios produced the movie, which is ultimately owned by Walt Disney.
block_03: Here is another fun fact,  Lucas Films is also owned by Disney.  Why does this matter? Well, investors reacted in a good way to the teaser for Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker which is the 9th episode of the Star Wars franchise and will be released in December 2019. Could this be another game win? We will have to see.
